p.em: Implementation Spec for Distributed Gossip/Sync Subsystems

g.text: SCENARIO A: Without Jitter (Synchronized Thundering Herd)

ul.li: Server Load: Uniform distribution across time-series buckets
Retries: Exponential backoff + jitter prevents recursive storms

div.p: When last_sync + interval <= current_time, all nodes trigger simultaneously. Result: p99 Latency degradation.
delay = rand(0, 0.1 * interval) Requests are decorrelated. Result: Higher throughput.
